text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
My mother is a chronologist… so we had a magnificent study 
at home. There were all sorts of books on history there.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
When I was still young, what I became especially obsessed 
with was… the racing history of horsegirls.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Racing history was profoundly sentimental… and it wasn't 
something that began and ended with an individual — it was 
full of interwoven stories charged with emotion.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but be excited… by that grand "illustrated scroll" 
that only grew larger the more I learned about its past.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
History is much like those illustrations. Countless dots drawn 
by all those involved in racing, connecting to form lines from 
which a single, massive image emerges.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf marked a brilliant dot. But after her 
came Tokai Teio and others. Through their connections, 
one illustration began took shape.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, Grass Wonder, El Condor Pasa… 
If any of them were missing, their generation's 
illustration wouldn't have ended up as beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…When I realized the stories they told were very real, 
I was… captivated. By this history, and…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I wanted to be part of those illustrations.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Gran and Love will be drawing their dots from here on out. 
I want to do the same, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm still lacking. Completely. Compared to our predecessors 
who have woven our history… and compared to the girls who 
will weave it from now on.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …And I hate that. I can't forgive myself for lacking. Because…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to weave this history with them.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I want to make someone feel as excited as I was back then. 
That's what I've been thinking…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Ah. I-I'm sorry…! Rambling on all by myself…
choice_data_list: Not at all… Thank you for sharing.
No… Thank you for sharing.

text_block_list.text:
I understood now why she was pushing herself so hard. 
She had a dream… and wasn't about to spare any effort 
to achieve it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Of course, I know I'm talking big, but…
choice_data_list: That's not true at all… Not at all.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Trainer.

Because I actually felt it was such a shame when I watched her 
in the practice race. With the slightest of changes, she could 
become a huge star. I was certain of it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Umm. Actually, in two weeks, there will be an Open Day 
here at Tracen Academy, where we invite racing fans…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running in the event race held there. 
So, I don't want to show a poor performance…
choice_data_list: Ah, so that's why…

text_block_list.text:
After hearing about her dream and seeing her passion, 
the words naturally spilled from my lips…
choice_data_list: If you don't mind, could I help you out?
Would you be alright with me helping?

text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I asked Chrono Genesis to show me 
some of her past race footage. …In every race, she ran 
with a pensive expression.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
This one is the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies… 
I positioned myself based on the race Buena Vista won.
choice_data_list:
There was space on the inside too, 
why didn't you take that?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Honestly, I was torn. The year after Buena, 
a horsegirl who charged from the inside won. 
So I wondered which one I should reference…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But I stayed on the outside. Looking at past practice races, 
number eight running on the inside had a tendency to drift. 
To win here, I had to ——
choice_data_list: …Do you always think this much while running?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Yes. History is "established fact"… so I think 
it'd be a waste not to utilize it…
choice_data_list: I see…

text_block_list.text:
Watching Chrono Genesis' races along with 
her commentary, I realized something…
choice_data_list: <size=34>You might be overthinking things during the race!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: O-Overthinking, you say…?

Her deep knowledge of racing history is her weapon. 
But she tries so hard to reference it that it gives the 
impression she's getting too stuck in her own head.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Stop thinking so much! Just run freely!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I see… freely. Yes, I'll try to keep that in mind…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Running in a way that doesn't reference history, 
a way uniquely mine… freely… without thinking 
about anything…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaaahhhhh!!!
choice_data_list: T-This is…!!

text_block_list.text:
Chrono Genesis was still out of breath as I called out 
"Good work!" to her. A little later, I shared my thoughts 
on her running.
choice_data_list: A massive breakaway might be taking "free" a bit too far…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sorry…! I was just thinking about running freely, and before I knew it, I ended up like this… Uugh…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've only ever run by referencing history… 
So when you tell me not to reference anything, well…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what running in my own unique way 
is even supposed to be like…
choice_data_list: <size=34>I don't think you really need to think about that</size>.

text_block_list.text:
Running naturally without thinking about anything — that should 
allow her to run her own way. That's why it really is important 
to "not think about anything", but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I see… So I don't even need to be conscious of it………
choice_data_list: <size=32>(She still looks like she's pondering over something…)</size>
<size=32>(She still looks like she's pondering over something…)</size>

text_block_list.text:
In the end, just telling her "Run without thinking!" was always 
unlikely to be sufficient advice to help her work through this. 
I need to give her something more useful ——

…Well, I'd love to, but I can't think of anything right now. 
Then what should I do? Where could a history lover like her 
find answers? The only thing that comes to mind is…
choice_data_list: …Shall we go to the Horsegirl Museum?
…Want to go to the Horsegirl Museum?

text_block_list.text:
History has always been such a big part of her. 
It's a hard ask for her to separate herself from 
it in the middle of a race now. So instead…
choice_data_list: <size=40>Let's rethink what history means to you</size>.
<size=40>Let's rethink what history means to you</size>.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I see now… What history means to me… Ah!
choice_data_list: Hmm? Think of something?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just… there's a special exhibit, so it caught 
my eye… It wasn't here the last time…
choice_data_list: You're right. Want to take a quick look?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Y-Yes…! If that's alright with you, Trainer…

We watched the video exhibit titled "The Path to Back-to-Back 
Grand Prix Victories", which featured famous horsegirls who 
had carved their names into history.
